title: hordeum sylvaticum
intro: Hordeum sylvaticum, also known as wild spelt, is a wild grass species that belongs to the wheat family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hordeum sylvaticum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve gut health, and lower cholesterol levels. Hordeum sylvaticum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
